action_set_definitions.name: get_incident_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current simulation time, weather conditions, and the grid-based fire map to identify the ignition sector and fire front movement.

action_set_definitions.name: get_civilian_zones
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of all civilian population centers, their current populations, and coordinates.

action_set_definitions.name: get_road_network_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the status of the road network, identifying arterial routes, junctions, current traffic volume, and maximum capacity.

action_set_definitions.name: get_emergency_resources
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the location and status of all emergency units, including law enforcement and fire units.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_safety_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Computes the Fire Arrival Time (FAT) and the Evacuation Time Estimate (ETE) for a specific population zone based on current fire spread and road conditions.

zone_id.description: The ID of the population zone.

action_set_definitions.name: deploy_unit
action_set_definitions.description: Dispatches a specific emergency unit to a target location (junction or zone) to establish control or support.

unit_id.description: The ID of the unit to deploy.

destination_id.description: The ID of the junction or zone destination.

action_set_definitions.name: issue_mass_notification
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers a specific emergency protocol for a civilian zone.

zone_id.description: The ID of the target zone.

state_description.timestamp: The current simulated time and date of the emergency.
state_description.weather: Current atmospheric conditions influencing fire behavior.
state_description.map_grid: A list of grid sectors containing fire intensity (0-10) and fuel levels.
state_description.civilian_zones: Status of population centers in the area.
state_description.emergency_units: Current location and status of fire-fighting and medical resources.
state_description.road_network: Availability and congestion levels of evacuation routes.
